products.name: UAV Parachute Recovery Systems
products.descriptor: Parachute recovery systems for UAVs, target drones, and other unmanned air vehicles

evidence.snippet:
UAV Recovery Systems
====================
recovery parachutes for UAVs

Butler Parachute Systems has the experience, the personnel and the facilities to design and manufacture a wide variety of parachutes and recovery system components and equipment ranging from small sub-munitions decelerators (8-inch) to solid cloth canopies up to 154 feet in diameter. We do not manufacture or service any equipment for skydiving.

products.name: HX-Series Canopies
products.descriptor: High-speed canopy family with patented BAT™ Slider technology for pilot emergency egress

evidence.snippet: Aircrew Parachutes for the Premier Flight Test Program: BPS designed and built emergency back type parachutes with HX-500/24 canopies, automatic ripcord releases, bailout oxygen and Capewell riser releases.

Tethered Bundle Parachute Canopy: After numerous failures on the original equipment canopy for this application, the DevGrp tried the HX-500/600 canopies with 100% success rate. The TT-600 is now standard equipment.

products.name: BA-30 LPP (Low Profile Parachute System)
products.descriptor: USAF-selected low profile high-altitude bailout parachute replacing legacy BA-22 systems

evidence.snippet: The BPS Commercial High Altitude Bailout System was selected by the USAF as the BA-30 Low Profile Parachute System (LPP). The BA-30 LPP replaces all the legacy BA-22 emergency parachutes in use by all US Air Force units.

products.name: TT-600 (Tethered Tandem Bundle)
products.descriptor: Tethered tandem bundle parachute system adopted by USAF, USN, and allied nations

evidence.snippet: Tethered Bundle Parachute Canopy: After numerous failures on the original equipment canopy for this application, the DevGrp tried the HX-500/600 canopies with 100% success rate. The TT-600 is now standard equipment.

Special Operations Forces: Butler Parachutes Tethered Tandem Bundle System, the TT-600, has been adopted by the USAF, USN, Sweden, Norway and others. The SMARTChute system and it’s components are also widely used.

products.name: SMARTChute
products.descriptor: Parachute system and components widely used by special operations and US Forest Service

evidence.snippet: Aircrew Parachutes: The smoke jumpers have purchased several different personnel parachutes for their aircrew and loadmasters, as well as SMARTChute systems and components. Furthermore, in FY 2001-2002, the FS purchased over 700 chest reserve parachutes using the BPS LoPo 550 canopy.

Special Operations Forces: Butler Parachutes Tethered Tandem Bundle System, the TT-600, has been adopted by the USAF, USN, Sweden, Norway and others. The SMARTChute system and it’s components are also widely used.

products.name: Cargo Delivery Parachutes
products.descriptor: Parachute systems for cargo delivery and aerial resupply missions

evidence.snippet: Butler Parachutes manufactures high-quality parachute systems for emergency egress, military missions, cargo delivery, and UAV systems.
*   [Cargo Delivery](https://www.butlerparachutes.com/canopies/cargo-parachutes/)

products.name: Lopo Series Canopies
products.descriptor: Low-profile canopy family for pilot reserve and chest parachute applications

evidence.snippet: Aircrew Parachutes: The smoke jumpers have purchased several different personnel parachutes for their aircrew and loadmasters, as well as SMARTChute systems and components. Furthermore, in FY 2001-2002, the FS purchased over 700 chest reserve parachutes using the BPS LoPo 550 canopy.
*   [Lopo Series](https://www.butlerparachutes.com/canopies/lopo-series/)

evidence.snippet: *   [Water Activated Riser Release](https://www.butlerparachutes.com/military-parachutes/water-activated-riser-release/)

products.name: Personnel Bailout Systems
products.descriptor: Custom high- and low-altitude aircrew bailout parachute systems with oxygen and CYPRES AAD

evidence.snippet:
Personnel Bailout Systems
=========================
High and Low Altitude Bailout Systems

The BPS Commercial High Altitude Bailout System was selected by the USAF as the BA-30 Low Profile Parachute System (LPP). The BA-30 LPP replaces all the legacy BA-22 emergency parachutes in use by all US Air Force units.

products.name: Flight Test Solutions
products.descriptor: Custom high-altitude, high-speed emergency parachute systems for flight test pilots

evidence.snippet:
*   ![flight test pilot walks to plane wearing helmet and Butler emergency parachute](https://www.butlerparachutes.com/wp-content/uploads/butler-parachute-systems-equipment-1600x800.jpg)
    ### Parachutes For Flight Test Pilots
    Custom configured high altitude systems designed and equipped for high speed and high altitude survival.
    [Learn More](https://www.butlerparachutes.com/test-pilot-parachutes/)

Aircrew Parachutes for the Premier Flight Test Program: BPS designed and built emergency back type parachutes with HX-500/24 canopies, automatic ripcord releases, bailout oxygen and Capewell riser releases.
